# HRMS V2 Project Status Report (v2.6.1)
**Generated by:** Orion (Project Orchestrator)
**Auditor:** Noah (Logic & Workflow Auditor)
**Date:** 2026-05-06

## 1. Executive Summary
The system has successfully migrated to **v2.6.1 (Mobile Readiness & API Optimization)**. Architectural integrity is high, with secure stateless authentication and PWA foundations in place. Core modules (Org, Employee, Attendance, Leave, Appraisals) are fully operational and verified for multi-country logic. Functional gaps remain in Payroll and Offboarding.

## 2. Module Status & Feature Parity

| Module | Status | Backend (Controller) | Frontend (View) | Findings |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Org Structure** | 🟢 STABLE | OrganizationController | organization.html | Fully verified multi-country logic. |
| **Employee Mgmt** | 🟢 STABLE | EmployeeController | directory.html | Multi-company isolation verified. |
| **Attendance** | 🟢 STABLE | AttendanceController | attendance.html | **v2.6.1 Update**: Multi-country tabs & Audit logs verified. |
| **Leave Mgmt** | 🟢 STABLE | LeaveController | leave.html | Policy-driven logic synced with attendance. |
| **Appraisals** | 🟢 STABLE | AppraisalController | appraisals.html | Full workflow implemented and verified. |
| **Payroll** | 🔴 SKELETON | PayrollController | payroll.html | **CRITICAL**: Backend returns mock data. No logic implemented. |
| **Offboarding** | 🔴 MISSING | **Missing** | offboarding.html (Mock) | No backend process. |
| **RBAC** | 🟢 STABLE | AuthController/Rbac | configurations#rbac | Stateless tokens & Dynamic role lookup active. |
| **Mobile/PWA** | 🟢 VERIFIED | N/A | manifest.json | PWA manifest and responsive UI verified. |

## 3. Logic & Security Audit (Noah Protocols)
- **Authentication**: Stateless 32-byte hex tokens are correctly implemented in `AuthController`.
- **Data Scoping**: `verifyDataScope` is strictly enforced across sensitive controllers.
- **Workflow Integrity**: Sync between Leave status and Attendance logs respects localized company calendars.
- **Performance**: API response times are currently stable, but database indexing is required to sustain <300ms targets as data grows.

## 4. Identified Risks & Recommendations

### [CRITICAL] Functional Gap: Payroll
The `PayrollController` is currently a skeleton. This prevents the system from being a complete HRMS solution.
> **Recommendation**: Prioritize Phase 12 (Payroll Logic) for the v2.6.2 release.

### [HIGH] Performance Bottleneck: Database
Lack of composite indexes on `attendance_logs` and `leave_requests` will cause latency in reporting.
> **Recommendation**: Implement Noah's recommended indexing strategy in the next migration patch.

### [MEDIUM] Security: SSL Enforcement
While SSL is "supported", application-level enforcement (HTTPS redirection) is not explicitly visible in middleware.
> **Recommendation**: Add a dedicated `SecurityMiddleware` to force HTTPS.

## 5. Conclusion
**Verdict: PASS WITH CAUTIONS**
The v2.6.1 release is stable and secure for the modules currently in `VERIFIED` status. Mobile readiness is achieve. Focus must now shift to functional completeness (Payroll) and performance optimization.
